notes:
Tutorial and starting main campains work,  only issue is that sound effects are not working.  Other sounds (crew talking) and music are working normally.

Graphics running on high with no visual artifacts etc.   Running really well.
title: Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific

notes: Some sound effects are missing, but otherwise the game is perfectly playable.  The game has crashed in very rare cases, but I have yet to determine if this is related to proton.
title: Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific
